H ^ ^ c f > ftcf>m ^ f e * * 3 f k 3T^T cbl4a>*fi ^>T f ^ f t f^eft^R^ MR4)«HW 7.. ^ T ^ ^ ^ W 6 > imt • & ^ 5 " ^ i R & y ^ t J • . -- 3 of 12 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY _ [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] • & t 7 r o 15 & r o CN CD rr w to r*- co ' cn CM 5 5 ! « -- 4 of 12 -- [W] I I — ^ P S 3(i)] *TKcT ^T <M<W : 3TOTtIR^T V fc \% £ PO 6 15 u CM CO ^ t IX) CD Is * CO O ) O r - CM CO- CM CM CM CM CM CM rts fc J £ ^ to £ r r5 ScSllfll'-Z -- 5 of 12 -- THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(i)] -- 6 of 12 -- VII. 3ftf 3T^T 3ti%nf^ fofa f) fcT VIII. aifSm arftnfm ^ ) fife arf^rc i) ^Tc^^ncl *T •ii) "GRT ^ * *fr . iii) smcf ^TT^ MINISTRY OF TEXTILES / NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 4th August, 2010 G.S.R. 657(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Section 21 of theNational Jute Board Act, 2008 (12 of 2009) Development Council (Procedural) Rules, 2002, except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersessio following rules, namely:— 1. Short title and commencement.—(1) These rules may be called the National Jute Board Rules, 2010. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their "publication in the Official Gazette. ' • 2. Definitions.—(1) In these rules, unless the context otherwise requires,— (a) "Act" means the National Jute Board Act, 2008; (b) "Form" means Form appended to these rules. (2) Words and expressions used herein and not defined, but defined in the Act, shall have the meanings r 3. Powers and duties of Chairperson.—Subject to. the provisions of the Act, the Chairperson shall be res functioning of the Board. 4. Powers and functions of Vice-Chairperson.—The Vice-Chairperson shall preside over the meetings of th 5. Term of office of member.—A member shall hold office for a teWi of two years from the date on which h 6. Filling of vacancy of members.—(1) A vacancy of the member of-the Board, other than the ex officio appointment, as the case may be, by the Central Government in the manner specified in sub-section (4) of Section 3. -- 7 of 12 -- (2) A member nominated or appointed, as the case may be, to fill up a vacancy shall Hold office for the rema in whose place he has been so nominated or appointed. - . 7. Annual Report.—The Board shall prepare its annual report in Form 1 and submit a copy'thereof to the-Ce following year and the Central Government shall place such annual report on the Table of both Houses of Parliament 8. Annual statement of accounts and other relevant records.—(1) At the end of a period of twelve months ending w prepare the following financial statements :— (i) Balance Sheet in Form 2; (ii) Income and Expenditure Account in Form 3; (iii) Receipts and Payments Account in Form 4. (2) The annual statement of accounts duly approved by the Board shall be submitted to the Comptroller an 30th June following the year to which the accounts relate who shall audit the accounts of the Board and report thereon. (3) The annual statement of accounts duly adopted by the Board and after certification by the .Comptroller and A auditor's report thereon, shall be submitted by the Secretary of the Board to the Central Government before 30th September fol (4) The Balance Sheet, Income and Expenditure Account, Receipts and Payments Account mentioned in clause (1) sh the Secretary of the Board. . . .
